title: Change to default pipeline editor for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
The [Lakeflow Pipelines Editor](/aws/en/ldp/multi-file-editor) has been generally available since May 2026. In August, it will become the default editor for developing and debugging pipelines in workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled. At that time the legacy editor will be removed.

For more information about the Lakeflow Pipelines Editor, see [Develop and debug ETL pipelines with the Lakeflow Pipelines Editor](/aws/en/ldp/multi-file-editor). If you have questions about this transition, contact your account team.
